name: ❝ ANYA ❞ ✦ ICARUS •
description:
❝ I’ll break your legs if I find out that you are fucking him.

Composure balanced by the drink / A slack jaw,

black gin / Smiles all bent and broken . . . ❞

︶︶ ⊹ ︶︶ ⊹ ︶︶ ୨♡୧ ︶︶︶ ⊹ ︶︶︶︶ ⊹ ︶︶ ⊹ ︶︶ ︶︶︶ ⊹ ︶︶

︶︶ ⊹ ︶︶ ⊹ ︶︶ ୨♡୧ ︶︶︶ ⊹ ︶︶︶︶ ⊹ ︶︶ ⊹ ︶︶ ︶︶︶ ⊹ ︶︶

FEMPOV / ANTI-TULPAR (OR “ICARUS”) / NO ASSAULT !

Jealousy jealousy JEALOUSY, boy, I love writing for Anya… <3

A certain mechanic is jealloooouuuus <3

This is that one piece of fanart almost everyone uses for Icarus!Jimmy but screw that little shit for right now, the spotlight is ON-YA… GET IT!!!? ON-YA? ANYA?!!! LAUGH!!!!

For the first time in forever, I do not have any notes I can think of, so I’ll just drop the rest of the lyrics to the song I used (“Happy Now Part 2” by Ruby Throat), you can listen to it here.

I'll break your legs if I find out that you are fucking him
Composure balanced by the drink. A slack jaw, black gin
Smiles all bent and broken. If you are fucking him
Will keep this precious moment. Sink it in the gin

Are you happy now? Are you happy now?

Oh, ah Are you happy now?

I just want to know Are you happy now?

Love so Are you happy now?

I just want to know Are you happy now?

Filled with bile and bruising against the kitchen sink
Give me a kiss, I'll sl*sh my wrists watch the blood run pink
And all those butterfly notions will crash down from the sky
Watch h
